meta.description: Create rich, structured backstories for your RPG characters — step by step.

shell.footerTagline: Structure, preview, and export for character stories.
shell.footerPrivacy: Drafts stay on your device — no account required.

home.badge: RPG backstory · all in the browser
home.heroTitle: Complete character stories, step by step.
home.heroLead: Organize origin, personality, relationships, and goals in a clear flow, watch the live preview, and export the final version right from your browser.
home.card1Body: Each step covers an important pillar of the backstory so you do not miss anything.
home.card2Body: See the document take shape as you fill in your character.
home.card3Body: Download the final story as Markdown, plain text, or PDF with no backend required.

criarPage.title: Build your backstory with steps, validation, and a live preview.
criarPage.lead: Use the left column to fill each section; on the right, the document updates as you go. On the last step, export as Markdown, plain text, or PDF.

basic.title: Basic information
basic.description: Character and player names, age, race, and class — a portrait of who they are.

origin.title: Origin and history
origin.description: Place of origin, family, social background, and defining events.

personality.title: Personality and traits
personality.description: Temperament, values, weaknesses, fears, habits, and quirks.

goals.title: Goals and motivations
goals.description: Short-term goals and life objectives in short description blocks.

appearance.title: Appearance and behavior
appearance.description: What the reference image does not show: height, hidden marks, first impression, voice, and mannerisms.

freeNotes.title: Free notes
freeNotes.description: Anything that does not fit the earlier steps.

export.title: Export
export.description: Download the document as Markdown, text, or PDF. The preview on the right reflects everything you entered.

wizard.exportCalloutTitle: Almost there — choose how to download
wizard.exportCalloutBody: The preview shows the full document. Each option saves a file on your device — no server involved.
wizard.exportTileMarkdownDesc: Great for Notion, Obsidian, or repositories.
wizard.exportTilePdfDesc: Fixed layout for printing or archiving.
wizard.previewDescription: Updates as you complete the steps. Use the Export step to download the file.

preview.emptyBody: Fill in the steps on the left to see the preview here.

origin.relativesEmpty: No bonds added yet. Use the button above to add parents, close friends, relatives, or other important ties.
origin.name: Name
origin.eventsEmpty: No events added yet. Include moments that shaped your character.

personality.temperamentIntro: Pick suggestions or add custom chips. Click a custom chip or the X to remove.
personality.valuesIntro: Mark what matters and add free-form values. Custom chips have an X; you can also click the label to remove.
personality.flawsEmpty: No weaknesses added yet. Include flaws, vices, or limitations.
personality.fearsEmpty: No fears added yet. Describe each fear and its intensity.
personality.habitsEmpty: No habits added yet. Routines, tics, or everyday patterns.
personality.quirksEmpty: No quirks added yet. Catchphrases, odd habits, or unique details.
personality.quirkBgPlaceholder: Where does this quirk come from?

goals.shortTermEmpty: No goals added yet. Use the button above to add one.
goals.lifeEmpty: No life objectives added yet. Use the button above to add one.

appearance.heroNote: Visible looks (face, skin, clothes, armor, hair, etc.) belong on {heroForgeLink}, where you build the reference miniature. Here, describe only what the miniature or image does not show well at the table or in the story.
appearance.mvpBody: For now this step is only text boxes: it takes effort and you think through each block on your own. That is not the level of support the app aims for — the goal is to make backstory creation easier with prompts, optional examples, tips, and maybe smaller fields or progressive disclosure, like other steps. Improvements are planned in later product phases (polish and narrative guidance).
appearance.heightPlaceholder: E.g. taller than the party average; looks compact but heavy; a presence that stands out in a crowd…
appearance.marksLabel: Scars, tattoos, or marks hidden under clothes / armor
appearance.marksPlaceholder: E.g. shoulder burn hidden by armor; intimate rune; crooked finger from an old fight…
appearance.firstImpressionsPlaceholder: E.g. looks tired even when calm; always scanning for exits; warmth that disarms; an aura that raises suspicion…
appearance.voicePlaceholder: E.g. low rasp; talks fast when nervous; coastal accent; long pauses before answering…
appearance.movementLabel: Movement, posture, tics, or habitual gestures
appearance.movementPlaceholder: E.g. slight limp; silent steps; very straight back; twists a ring when thinking; avoids eye contact…

freeNotes.heading: Free-form topics
freeNotes.empty: No notes yet. Use the button above to add titled blocks with descriptions.

validation.stepGeneric: Check the fields in this step.

export.pdfError: Could not generate the PDF. Please try again in a moment.
